unique_validated_findings.reason: Pinned-source and dumped-deployed-binary validator PoCs accepted a Token-2022 transfer-fee redemption token_in, recorded gross amount 100000000000, but the vault received only 95000000000. SPL and Token-2022 zero-fee negative controls pass, while fee-bearing cancel and fulfill paths fail until top-up; even top-up returns only net to the redeemer. Second-order economic bug: boss top-up + cancel returns 95M to redeemer (second fee charge), creating 5M protocol treasury hole.
unique_validated_findings.recommendation: Add Token-2022 transfer-fee rejection to redemption paths (matching offer execution guard at token_utils.rs:372), or record net received amount instead of gross.

confirmed_honest_zero.surface: drift: all token movement paths (deposit, withdraw, liquidation, insurance fund, mint, burn)
confirmed_honest_zero.reason: Drift's validate_mint_fee() function (controller/token.rs:214-227) is a hard gate that rejects any Token-2022 mint with a non-zero TransferFeeConfig extension, returning ErrorCode::NonZeroTransferFee. This function is called in every token movement path: send_from_program_vault_with_signature_seeds (line 69), receive (line 120), mint_tokens (line 176), burn_tokens (line 201), transfer_checked_with_transfer_hook (line 241). No bypass paths exist — the only invoke_signed that does SPL token transfers is in controller/token.rs:274. Liquidation is purely accounting-based (no on-chain token transfers). Admin initialization does not check for transfer fees, but validate_mint_fee blocks all actual transfers.
confirmed_honest_zero.recommendation: No action required. Drift explicitly blocks Token-2022 transfer fee tokens at the protocol level.

unconfirmed_candidates.reason: MarginFi has calculate_pre_fee_amount / calculate_post_fee_amount but need to verify ALL code paths (flash loan, borrow, liquidate) use them consistently. Harness scaffolded but not yet exercised against validator.
unconfirmed_candidates.next_step: Deploy Marginfi .so to local validator, create Token-2022 mint with fee, exercise deposit/withdraw/borrow/liquidate paths, measure collateral_recorded vs vault_delta.

attempts.crucible_template: written: reusable Token-2022 fee invariant harness template with P-TF-001 through P-TF-007 properties
attempts.onre_poc: confirmed: validator PoC with measured deltas (100M gross → 95M vault), false-positive controls pass
attempts.onre_sbf_build: blocked: blake3 crate SBF build failure with v1.51 platform-tools, mainnet binary authority locked
attempts.marginfi_harness: scaffolded: 270+ line NativeHarness with TransferFeeConfig handling, requires validator deployment
attempts.drift_codegraph: completed: 15,908 nodes, 88,958 edges indexed. validate_mint_fee identified as hard gate in controller/token.rs. All 5 callers mapped. No bypass paths found.

next_steps: Submit OnRe H1 through human gate (already submit_ready from v6.13 investigation).
Deploy Marginfi .so to local validator and exercise Token-2022 deposit/withdraw/borrow paths.
Update corpus taxonomy: Token-2022 transfer fee coverage = 1 confirmed defect (OnRe) + 1 confirmed guard-bound honest-zero (Drift) + 1 candidate (Marginfi).
Write lab notebook entry documenting Drift's validate_mint_fee guard pattern.
